name: _VIEWSlew@12
notes: slew (free-look) camera control

name: VIEWApplyMode
notes: if the view mode word (+0xB4) is set delegate to the view builder VIEWBuild; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWFromObject
notes: position the view from the tracked object (_objPtrs[view+0x1C]) and its state; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWUpdateByType
notes: per-object-type view update (object class 7/0xC/0xF branches)

name: VIEWFitDistance
notes: compute camera stand-off distance from the object radius (_ObjRadius); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWAngleScale
notes: angle-to-scale clamp helper for the view transform

name: _VIEWImmediateVisibility@0
notes: force the view to immediate (no-transition) visibility

name: VIEWInit
notes: allocate/initialise a view slot (MMPushAllocId; zero +0x1C/+0x1E); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWFree
notes: free the view's allocated buffer (_MMFreePtr on +0x60); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWSnapshot
notes: copy the 0x30-dword view state block (snapshot/restore helper); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _VIEWInTransition@0
notes: returns non-zero while the view is mid-transition

name: VIEWReplayRecordGate
notes: replay record gate: inside the _timerTicks window (DAT_005223F0/F4) set replay-active DAT_005224C0; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWReplayPlayback
notes: replay playback: when replay-active copy the 0x30-dword saved-view buffer (DAT_00522400) into the view; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWBuild
notes: build the external/spot view for the given mode (the view builder VIEWApplyMode calls); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWModeLookup
notes: scan the view-mode table at DAT_004EC420; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWScaleClamp
notes: clamp/scale helper for the view field-of-view or zoom; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: VIEWSlewIntegrate
notes: frame-rate-scaled slew integration (_LMultDiv256 by _systemFrameTicks); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _VIEWChangeObj@12
notes: switch the view to a different tracked object

name: VIEWCanSeeTarget
